summary: Core policy logic is comprehensively tested (no-policy, age, size, keep-latest, combined policies, validation), but significant gaps exist: empty artifact arrays not tested, boundary conditions untested (age/size exactly at threshold), Invoke-ArtifactCleanup only has 1 minimal test without summary format verification, Run-Cleanup.ps1 CLI wrapper entirely untested in Pester (no error path coverage despite task requiring 'meaningful error messages'), no tests for malformed JSON or missing fixture files. Good test structure with fixture helper and clear naming, but Pester suite only tests happy paths and basic validation. Integration tests via act exist but fall outside traditional Pester scope. Would catch basic policy logic regressions but miss edge cases, error handling, and CLI integration issues.
